name: De Minimis Market Discount Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies automatically if the market discount is below the specified threshold (1/4 of 1 percent of the stated redemption price at maturity multiplied by the number of complete years to maturity).

description: Treats market discount as zero if it is less than 0.25% of the redemption price multiplied by the years to maturity, effectively allowing the discount to be treated as capital gain rather than ordinary interest.
